title: coreopsis bituminosa
intro: Coreopsis bituminosa, also known as Leavenworth's coreopsis, is a perennial wildflower native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its rich composition of flavonoids, terpenoids, and other bioactive compounds. Coreopsis bituminosa has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
